headline: The Spiraling Cost of Making AI
summary: Spending money to make money is taking on a whole new meaning in the artificial-intelligence world.  The public is already familiar with the exorbitant capital spending of the world’s largest tech companies as they race to build up their AI capabilities.  OpenAI and Anthropic expect to spend nearly $65 billion combined this year just on the costs to train and operate their AI models, according to financial documents obtained by The Wall Street Journal.

headline: 3 Value Stocks Including Kratos Defense & Security Solutions That May Be Priced Below Intrinsic Value
summary: The United States market has experienced a notable upswing with a 4.4% increase over the past week and a substantial 32% rise in the last year, while earnings are projected to grow by 16% annually. In this environment, identifying stocks that may be priced below their intrinsic value can offer investors opportunities for growth, as they look for companies like Kratos Defense & Security Solutions that have strong fundamentals yet remain undervalued by the market.

headline: Celsius Holdings And Two Insider-Owned Growth Stocks To Watch
summary: The United States market has experienced a robust performance recently, climbing 4.4% in the last week and rising 32% over the past year, with earnings forecasted to grow by 16% annually. In this thriving environment, stocks with high insider ownership can be particularly appealing as they often signal confidence from those closest to the company’s operations and potential for sustained growth.
